title: Harbour Housewares 3L Bathroom Bin - Matte White - Round Stainless Steel Pedal Bin Slim Kitchen Rubbish Trash Can Garbage Dustbin with Lid and Inner Liner Bucket
features: 🖤 Sleek & Contemporary Design - Crafted from rust-proof stainless steel, this 3L bathroom pedal bin adds a stylish, modern touch to any space. Its sleek finish complements all décor styles. (Diameter: 16.5cm, Height: 26cm)

🚮 Convenient Hands-Free Operation - The sturdy, non-slip foot pedal allows smooth, hygienic hands-free use, ideal for busy bathrooms or bedrooms. Keep your space clean, tidy, and functional with ease.

🪣 Removable Inner Bucket - Designed with a solid plastic liner featuring a handy carry handle, this bin makes waste disposal simple and mess-free. Easy to remove and clean, keeping maintenance effortless.

🏠 Ideal for Small Spaces - With a 3L capacity, this compact pedal bin is perfect for tight areas like bathrooms, offices, or bedrooms. Its discreet size offers convenience without sacrificing style or efficiency.

💪 Durable & Versatile - Built for long-lasting performance, this stainless steel bin is both practical and stylish. Available in multiple colours, it’s the perfect blend of function and modern home design.
description: Product Description Nothing beats a tidy bathroom - the Harbour Housewares Bathroom Collection will help you keep the surfaces of your smallest space free from clutter and looking worthy of any five-star luxury spa!
